description: Connect Datadog to sync monitors, dashboards, incidents, hosts, and events for observability intelligence.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Found in Datadog → Organization Settings → API Keys

install_fields.label: Application Key
install_fields.help: Found in Datadog → Organization Settings → Application Keys

install_fields.label: Datadog Site (default: datadoghq.com)
install_fields.help: Use datadoghq.eu for EU, us3.datadoghq.com for US3, or leave blank for US (datadoghq.com)

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validate credentials and record connector as installed

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verify credentials are still valid via GET /v1/validate

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Sync monitors, dashboards, hosts, and events to knowledge base

methods.name: list_monitors
methods.description: List all Datadog monitors with pagination

methods.name: get_monitor
methods.description: Get a single Datadog monitor by ID

methods.name: list_hosts
methods.description: List all Datadog hosts with pagination

methods.name: list_events
methods.description: List Datadog events for a time window (last 24h default)
